reviews.review_title: Love this game but it could be better
reviews.review_description:
I love the fact that i can beat up people but i have ideas to make the game even better 

1. CAN YOU PLEASE ADD the key to save the little brother 
2.Can you let see the other animals because i want to see that HIPPO
3.can we ride the elephant and crash in to the people outside the cage or mabey just let us get out of the cage and free the other animals causing chaos 

for whoever read this thank you for your time and have a good day (or night just depends what side of the earth your on)🐵🙈🙉🙊

Honestly, I think it was worth the money :D!! The games pretty fun I like how you can beat up people, even if the police/ FBI will come in the cage once you knock someone out cold🫩.. But overall, it’s a good game. I can’t wait for future updates that are probably coming!

reviews.review_title: The game sucks and  made by AI
reviews.review_description: Every single game made by AI you can tell just like I am cat. I am monkey anything that starts with I am is probably made by AI just like this game that’s why I’m reading it one star and it’s way too overpriced especially for being too easy and also you can never free the little monkey.￼

The game was already good even without the key but now that they added the key it makes the game way more better I love how he grabs the bars and fights the people sometimes and now it’s just like an npc from I am cat because with one grab you can knock him out easily so you have to protect him and now when the cop comes he hides with us and we can interact with him in many ways he waves to us and follows us when we give him a sign! Best update the creator made it this game I can’t wait to see what’s next? Maybe they will let us escape and look around and maybe there will actually be a zoo keeper that will take care of us and not be a security guard chasing us and a backup assistant that frickn shoots us with a gun and It’s cool how the baby monkey has so many outstandingly awesome emotions like crying laughing and my favorite when he’s happy. I wonder what will come next I will wait. He probably won’t update for a while because he’s probably working on other events for his game like the beach area in I am cat that will be an absolute banger! 🤩🤩🤩🤩I am monkey is a game where you can play around fight the humans do tasks and save the baby monkey and have a friend to play with that is very fragile and delicate you can choose to be nice and have a pure heart or be evil and have a bad one 😈😈😈. Love this game can’t wait for more updates I will support your content to the end thank you very much!

reviews.review_title: I FINISHED THE QUESTS IN 30 MINS
reviews.review_description: While the game is funny in all there are way to many bugs plus the S.W.A.T guard is literally superman and if you grab him and get shot your hand is gone forever, basically a freaking collectable. Also, the police need to understand that the stupid tourists are tryna square up so yeah ima mess them up. Plus, WHEN IS THE NEW UPDATE COMING LIKE THE ELEPHANT IS HOLDING MY MONKEY CHILD HOSTAGE UNTIL I DO HIS STUPID QUESTS.

I love this game, its so fun to beat up the visitors and i love it when you can shave of people’s hair and squirt pigeon poo at them. The only thing is, is that sometimes when i complete a task i go back to the elephant and it says i haven’t done it, also when i run from the guard i go quite slow and it is hard to move. I do reccommend this although there are times when you regret buying it. 

thanks for your time to read this
There is a lot to do very fun 🥶👺🇲🇽👹🏳️‍🌈♥️🤮😛❤️🙏🗣️🌯🤮🌯🥶🫔💯🫩❤️😛😭🙃🇸🇹👹🥷🤗🥶🤤😊🤤🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🏿🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🥷🏿🏳️‍🌈😎😊👺🥷😛🤤🙏🫩🥀🥀🙏🙃😊❤️🇸🇹👹🤤 when is tiny dumb little stupid monkey coming out of the Dumb cage 🤤😛🤤😛🤤😛🤤

The game is fun, but I wish you could add a mode where nobody comes in, police doesn't attack you, and you don't need to do quests, just you being able to hurt people, climbing around, and not having to defend your son just to get police on you and the swat team. Like Story Mode and Free Play Mode. That is what would make the game amazing. I will edit it to 5 stars if you make this mode. Thanks if you read my review!

Fun (⭐️), emotionally educational as this game is EXACTLY how it feels being bullied so it teaches players why they shouldn't be a bully (⭐️), pastime (⭐️), sometimes the NPCs say funny things (⭐️).

However, no way to fight back against the swat officer (-⭐️).

Please update the game so we can get the key.
Result: ⭐️⭐️⭐️/⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️.

reviews.review_title: A really fun game for everyone
reviews.review_description: I know there are a lot of games luke this on the market, but it is reaply nice to have the immersion of an animal and act like that. It is really fun :) Nithing to complain, so 5 stars

The game actually is now fun because of the monkey. It's really funny just to take the policeman and shove them in the toilet just legs. He will get trapped. Also I love abusing the glitch where you can get out the map. I also act like the monkey is my child. I will murder whoever messes with him. But the thing is I don't like is that I waited so long just to get the monkey.

I finished all my tasks a long time ago and now the elephant gives us the key! I've been waiting forever for this moment! And now my baby monkey is free! 5 stars! If you download this game then you'll have soooo much fun!

reviews.review_title: It's a great game but sometimes buggy
reviews.review_description: I play I Am games like bird cat and security this game is kind of good but it's sometimes buggy when you lagged out of the world it's a good game with a lot of weapons but it's sometimes makes you fall down and lag out so I appreciate the game but it's sometimes laggy
It’s good for playing if you are going to put a smile on my face it’s so fun and I will recommend this game to other people ￼
The game feels like it has the worst beta testers of all time. After playing for long periods of time, the game just self-glitches or corrupts itself. Do not buy.
The theme and style of the game are good, but unlike I Am Cat (another great game) it feels very lonely because it doesn't have an online mode.

Its a good game but can get boring after you complete the missions.            
it is a game i would recommend but maybe not if you will be playing for hours :)

I like this game but it's kinda mid ya know because new folders are just ain't doing nothing they took ALMOST a year just to put multiplayer ￼￼￼in I am cat like dude I can do it faster and just like every thing that they are going to is "i am something" whats next I am lion 💔

First I love monkeys and this game is the best! And their is a new update were you can unlock the key for the baby monkey! And he can throw stuff! Definitely five stars one of the best games I’ve ever played.

i only gave it 4 Cruz its short and some of the mechanics for the grappling hook are hard
other than that it is amazing 1000/10 would recommend

the game is very good but it could be better with more missions than like maybe more like

Fun at start, but seems a shame to pay for this. My son apparently completed it in a few days, I suspect it was more he was bored. It seems very simple, not much brain power required. Perfect for anyone not interested in exercising the brain but exercising their wallet. 

Grateful for the lesson of how depressing it would be to be caged in a zoo. 

Parents be warned, you child only wants this game because a YouTuber made it look like an essential ingredient in their lives. 

A word for the creators, a little more brain challenges? Less just being able to shoot grannies in the head?
